member.name: T:Etch.Scene.SceneBuffer
member.summary: An immutable, compact encoding of a vector-graphics scene. Built by and consumed by the CPU/GPU renderers.

member.name: P:Etch.Scene.SceneBuffer.Commands
member.summary: All scene commands, in execution order.

member.name: P:Etch.Scene.SceneBuffer.CommandCount
member.summary: Number of commands in the scene.

member.name: T:Etch.Scene.SceneBuilder
member.summary: A ref-struct builder for constructing instances. Uses internally for zero-allocation warm paths. Must be disposed after or on error.

member.name: M:Etch.Scene.SceneBuilder.Begin(System.Int32)
member.summary: Starts a new scene builder with the given command capacity.
